moments.title: Tour de France concludes
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious cycling race, the Tour de France, is ongoing and wraps up this Sunday, July 26th, in Paris after three weeks of gruelling competition.

angles.name: Who won?
angles.copy: Did you follow the yellow jersey battle? The Tour de France concludes this Sunday – who was your rider of the race?

angles.name: Three weeks done
angles.copy: Three weeks, thousands of miles, one yellow jersey. The Tour de France winner is crowned this Sunday!

moments.title: The Hundred kicks off
moments.blurb: England's explosive 100-ball cricket tournament, The Hundred, is set to begin its 2026 season this week, bringing fast-paced action to stadiums across the UK.

angles.name: Get ready for cricket
angles.copy: Get ready for stumps! The Hundred is back this week, bringing its unique 100-ball cricket format to a city near you. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Summer sport
angles.copy: It's not just about the wickets, it's about the atmosphere! The Hundred returns this week – perfect summer sport.

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset
moments.blurb: The family-friendly Camp Bestival Dorset festival takes over Lulworth Castle from July 30th to August 2nd, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and entertainment.

angles.name: Family fun
angles.copy: Dust off your wellies! Camp Bestival Dorset is just days away, promising a weekend of family fun and fantastic music. Who are you taking?

angles.name: Ultimate family festival
angles.copy: From main stage acts to kids' raves, Camp Bestival Dorset kicks off next week. Get ready for the ultimate family festival!

moments.title: Kendal Calling returns
moments.blurb: Kendal Calling festival takes over Lowther Deer Park in Cumbria from July 30th to August 2nd, bringing a huge lineup of rock, indie, and pop to the fields.

angles.name: Cumbria calling
angles.copy: Cumbria calling! Kendal Calling kicks off next week with an epic lineup. Who's making the trip to Lowther Deer Park?

angles.name: Wellies, glitter, tunes
angles.copy: Wellies, glitter, and great tunes: Kendal Calling is nearly here! Get ready for a weekend in the fields.

moments.title: Paolo Nutini in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Scottish singer-songwriter Paolo Nutini plays a highly anticipated show at Glasgow Summer Sessions this Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Glasgow ready?
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready? Paolo Nutini takes the stage at Glasgow Summer Sessions this Sunday for what's sure to be an incredible gig.

angles.name: Live in home country
angles.copy: Hearing Paolo Nutini live in his home country? Yes please! He's at Glasgow Summer Sessions this weekend.

moments.title: Latest UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for the week ending July 18th has just been revealed, with Nova Flux holding strong at number one with 'Electric Dreams'.

angles.name: Current #1
angles.copy: The UK's number one song for the past week is Nova Flux with 'Electric Dreams'! Are you loving it?

angles.name: On repeat
angles.copy: What's been on repeat this week? The Official UK Singles Chart is out, and Nova Flux is still holding the top spot.

moments.title: Love Island UK finale approaches
moments.blurb: The current series of Love Island UK is nearing its dramatic conclusion, with the final episode confirmed to air this Monday, July 27th.

angles.name: Who wins?
angles.copy: Who's going to be crowned the winners? The Love Island finale is just days away – time to pick your favourite couple!

angles.name: Summer obsession
angles.copy: Our summer obsession is almost over! The Love Island final is this week. What's been your favourite moment of the series?

moments.title: New Netflix crime drama
moments.blurb: Netflix's new UK-produced crime thriller 'The London Underground Murders' premieres this Saturday, July 25th, promising a gripping mystery set beneath the capital.

angles.name: Binge-watch alert
angles.copy: Prepare for a binge-watch! New UK crime drama 'The London Underground Murders' drops on Netflix this Saturday. Who's watching?

angles.name: Crime fans
angles.copy: Another must-see for crime fans! 'The London Underground Murders' hits Netflix this weekend. Looks intense!

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, legendary Eagles drummer and vocalist, celebrates his 79th birthday this Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Don
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Don Henley on Wednesday! What's your favourite Eagles track he sang on?

angles.name: Rock legend
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'The Boys of Summer', Don Henley turns 79 this Wednesday. A true rock legend.

moments.title: Rufus Wainwright's 53rd
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated Canadian-American singer-songwriter Rufus Wainwright celebrates his 53rd birthday this Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Rufus
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 53rd birthday to the incredible Rufus Wainwright on Wednesday! Which of his beautiful songs is your favourite?

angles.name: Unique talent
angles.copy: The distinctive voice of Rufus Wainwright turns 53 this Wednesday. A unique talent in music.

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Iconic Guns N' Roses guitarist Slash celebrates his 61st birthday this Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Slash
angles.copy: Happy 61st birthday to the top-hatted guitar hero, Slash, this Thursday! What's your ultimate Guns N' Roses riff?

angles.name: Guitar icon
angles.copy: That iconic guitar sound turns 61 this Thursday! Slash, rock legend, celebrates his birthday.

moments.title: J.Lo's 57th birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday this Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday J.Lo
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to global icon, J.Lo turns 57 this Friday! What's your favourite Jennifer Lopez track?

angles.name: Still incredible
angles.copy: Still looking incredible at 57! Happy birthday to Jennifer Lopez this Friday. Get ready to dance!

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: Rolling Stones frontman and rock legend Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mick
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday. What's your all-time favourite Stones anthem?

angles.name: Rock icon
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still a rock icon. Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger this Sunday!

moments.title: Summer Holidays in full swing
moments.blurb: Schools across much of the UK are now officially on summer break, marking the start of six weeks of holidays for many families.

angles.name: Holiday plans
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are officially here for most! What are your plans for the next six weeks?

angles.name: No more school runs
angles.copy: No more school runs for a while! The summer holidays are in full swing – time for some fun in the sun!

moments.title: Exeter Craft Festival
moments.blurb: The annual Exeter Craft Festival takes place this weekend, July 26-27, showcasing local artisans and creative talent in the city centre.

angles.name: Support local
angles.copy: Support local talent! The Exeter Craft Festival is on this weekend – perfect for finding unique gifts or just browsing.

angles.name: Get crafty
angles.copy: Get crafty in Exeter! The annual Craft Festival brings local artisans to the city centre this weekend.
